case_title: VICKI HAINES VS. DOUGLAS N AKAY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED) SERVED MAY-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AKAY, DOUGLAS N
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $411.00 FILED BY HAINES, VICKI AS TO DEFENDANT AKAY, DOUGLAS N ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2019 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7-1-19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
